commit_message:
Fast cart load and VBXE bugfix Fast cart load and VBXE bugfix 1. This fixes a corner case (one single title makes the core crash) bug in the VBXE memac implementation.

2. It changes how the carts are loaded into SDRAM, now through the F OSD option rather than S. This speeds up things a lot (really a lot) , and shows the progress bar. The firmware / S loading part could not yet been entirely removed, it is still used to allow the user to select a cart type for headerless roms (and do some smal
